description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on push to main, on create, and on workflow dispatch. Use a matrix job strategy to build wheels on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest environments. For each environment, check out the code, set up QEMU if on Linux, set up Python 3.x, install dependencies, build wheels using cibuildwheel, build a pure Python wheel, and upload the wheels as an artifact.
